title: Peter Obi Reacts to INEC Voter Guidelines
summary: Obi comments on new voter registration updates.
details: Peter Obi urges Nigerians to verify their voter registrations and emphasizes the importance of transparent elections ahead of local polls.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Tinubu Administration Evaluates Meter Rollout Progress
details: The Tinubu administration confirms that electricity meter installations have reached half the states, aiming for full national coverage by late 2026.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Sunday Igboho Court Hearing Postponed Amid Security Review
summary: Hearing delayed while security concerns are assessed.
details: Legal proceedings involving activist Sunday Igboho were postponed due to heightened security concerns. Supporters say the delay impacts community peace efforts.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: El‑Rufai Advocates Broad Education Reforms
summary: Former governor promotes educational policy changes.
details: Nasir El‑Rufai called for curriculum reform, improved teacher training, and expanded digital access in Nigerian schools to align with global education standards.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Student Loan Disbursement Reaches Universities
details: Paged student loan funds were released to registered students across 36 states, helping cover tuition and living expenses for thousands.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Middle East Tensions Escalate
summary: Global leaders call for calm amid rising conflicts.
details: Countries across Europe, Asia, and the Americas closely monitor Middle East conflicts, urging restraint and diplomatic solutions to avoid escalation.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Global Oil Prices Hit 5-Year High
summary: Energy markets surge due to geopolitical instability.
details: International oil prices rise sharply, impacting economies worldwide and prompting governments to assess energy security measures.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: US Federal Reserve Adjusts Interest Rates
details: The Federal Reserve announces an increase in interest rates to curb inflation while aiming to sustain economic growth and investor confidence.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: AI Revolutionizes Healthcare
details: AI algorithms detect complex diseases with high accuracy, transforming hospital workflows and enhancing patient outcomes globally.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Cybersecurity Threats on the Rise
details: Advanced phishing, ransomware, and AI-driven attacks are increasing globally, requiring stronger cybersecurity measures in enterprises and governments.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Champions League Quarter-Finals Draw Announced
summary: Clubs learn their opponents for upcoming matches.
details: Elite European football clubs prepare with tactical focus for the quarter-finals, with analysts predicting intense clashes and fan excitement.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: France Presidential Election Voting Starts
details: France begins voting in its presidential election. Citizens evaluate candidates’ policies on economy, security, and education amid a highly contested campaign.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: UK General Election Campaign Intensifies
details: UK political parties intensify campaigning ahead of general elections, focusing on healthcare, education, and economic recovery promises.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: US Midterm Election Debates Heat Up
details: US midterm election candidates debate policies on economy, healthcare, and foreign policy, aiming to influence undecided voters.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: Nigeria’s Voter Roll Updates Ahead of 2026 Elections
details: The Independent National Electoral Commission updates voter rolls and distributes smart card readers nationwide, encouraging citizens to confirm their registration.
author: Editor: Omotara How

title: India State Assembly Elections Begin
details: State assembly elections start across several Indian states. Parties outline development and infrastructure agendas to appeal to local constituents.
author: Editor: Omotara How
